title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenovo India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Lenovo India:
Lenovo India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India!
